title: Dog Christmas Jumper Pet Dog Christmas Sweater Knitted Dogs Santa Jumper Christma Dogs Jumpers Puppy Christma Jumpers for Small Medium Large Funny Puppy Xmas Sweater(Santa Clau,S)
features: 🎅Adorable Dog Christmas Jumper: Very cute Christmas dog jumper, unique Santa Claus embroidery pattern design to get your furry friend ready for Christmas! A great dog Christmas sweater is sure to make your dog or cat stand out at the Christmas holiday party.

🎅Soft Christmas Dog Jumper: Crafted from high-quality fabric, this dog christmas sweater is comfortable, soft and stretchy and not easy to deform. The dog will not feel restrained when wearing christmas jumpers for dogs, and it will bring warmth to the dog.

🎅Versatile Puppy Christmas Jumper: Dog christmas jumper aren't just for Christmas! It is also suitable for your pet to wear on many occasions such as photo shoots, pet-themed parties or other indoor and outdoor activities in autumn and winter. Take cute photos of your pet at Christmas or any special occasion with this charming xmas dog jumpers.

🎅Christmas Jumper Dog for Small Medium Large Dogs: With a stretchable fabric, this dog xmas jumper ensures a comfortable and secure fit for dogs of various sizes, such as Dachshund, Shih Tzu, Chihuahua, Yorkie, Maltese, Bulldog, etc.

🎅Size: S: Neck Girth: 22cm/8.6in, Chest Girth: 34cm/13.3in, clothes length: 31cm/12.2in. Before purchasing, please measure your dog's size and refer to our size chart to choose the perfect size for this dog Christmas top. We recommend choosing the sweater size based on your pet's chest measurement for optimal comfort.
